pricing.refundPolicy: Challenge fees are non-refundable once the challenge begins.

payouts.schedule: Default profit share 80%, with Prime Split add-on to increase to 90%. First payout: One Phase 14 days, Two Phase 7 days, Stock Traders/Meme Coin/Bitcoin Maxi 14 days. Prime Payout add-on shortens timing for One Phase, Stock Traders, Meme Coin, and Bitcoin Maxi. Minimum payout $100 after profit split. First 3 approved payouts capped at 5% of nominated bankroll — profit above cap removed at reset. Funded min trading days: 7 then 5 (One Phase/Two Phase), 5 then 3 (Stock Traders), 5 every payout (Meme Coin/Bitcoin Maxi). Processing time 1–2 days.

rules.consistencyRule: Daily profit distribution cap: 30% for One Phase, Two Phase, Stock Traders; 40% for Meme Coin and Bitcoin Maxi. First 3 approved payouts capped at 5% of nominated bankroll.
rules.notes: Five challenge types: One Phase, Two Phase, Stock Traders, Meme Coin, and Bitcoin Maxi. All evaluations require minimum 3 trading days. Trading platform: TradeLocker. Daily drawdown: 5% (One Phase, Two Phase, Stock Traders), 3% (Bitcoin Maxi), none (Meme Coin — trailing drawdown only). Max drawdown: 10% (One Phase, Two Phase, Stock Traders), 5% (Bitcoin Maxi), 6.5% trailing (Meme Coin). News trading: not allowed within 10 minutes before and after major high-impact events on One Phase, Stock Traders, Meme Coin, and Bitcoin Maxi; allowed on Two Phase. Weekend/out-of-hours trading: not allowed on One Phase, Two Phase, Stock Traders; allowed on Meme Coin and Bitcoin Maxi. Swing trading allowed. Copy trading not allowed. EAs allowed on One Phase, Two Phase, Meme Coin, and Bitcoin Maxi; not allowed on Stock Traders. Prohibited strategies: martingale, hedging, HFT, scalping under 30 seconds, grid trading, tick scalping, copy trading, gap trading, arbitrage/market abuse. 30-day inactivity limit in both evaluation and funded stages. Maximum allocation up to $800,000 across active accounts. Multiple accounts on same or related IP not allowed. VPN/VPS allowed only if Risk team provided with VPN login history. Trade sizing must stay within +100% or -75% of previous positions. Default funded profit share 80%, Prime Split add-on increases to 90%. Prime Payout add-on shortens payout timing for One Phase, Stock Traders, Meme Coin, and Bitcoin Maxi funded accounts. First 3 approved payouts capped at 5% of nominated bankroll — profit above cap removed at reset. Simulated trading administered by Eightcap Services FZ-LLC in the UAE. Broker-backed via Eightcap.

markets.instruments: Forex, Indices, Commodities, Crypto, Stocks, Meme Coins. Leverage: Forex 1:50, Indices 1:10, Commodities 1:10, Crypto 1:1, Stocks 1:5, Meme Coins 10:1. All trading simulated with Eightcap pricing feed.

support.hours: FAQ hub, support tickets via contact form
